system.description: A god of animals, plantlife and all things druidic.
system.title: God of Nature

scriptures.name: Level 1: Furious Briars
scriptures.description: Create an area of aggressive plant life which attacks all enemies within close range of you every round for the rest of the encounter, dealing 1 damage per success up to your level in this god. You can move freely through the area.

specials.name: Immobilize target (Str test to break free)

scriptures.name: Level 2: Summon Beast
scriptures.description: Summon a beast that lives in the habitat you're presently in. It obeys you for an encounter. The beast's stats all begin at two. For every success you roll, increase a stat by one, up to your level in this god.

scriptures.name: Level 3: Animal Form
scriptures.description: Transform into a hulking beast of your choice. You gain temporary Health equal to the successes rolled. If your Wis is lower than your Str, your Str is temporarily increased to match. You can revert at will.
